title: PAR+ — Tour Edition
tagline: 27 holes, 3 greens, slopes that curve every roll.
blurb: PAR grows up: three themed nine-hole greens, portals, boosts, conveyors, magnets, moving gates and slopes — plus a predicted aim-arc and per-green letter grades.

controls.action: aim & set power (pull back from ball)
skip to next hole when sunk

whatsNew: Three themed 9-hole greens (27 holes) with a course-select + unlock progression
New obstacles: portals, boost pads, conveyors, magnets and moving walls
Slopes/elevation that curve the roll, with directional shading you can read
Predicted bounce aim-arc plus a fading shot-trail and crisper feedback
Per-green scorecard with par totals, letter grade (S-F) and saved course records
